productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Classic Black Belt
description: Synonymous with Scottish tradition and styling the elite for several years, Reid and Taylor's products are a class of their own. This leather belt from the brand comes in a smooth and simple design making it a classy formal wear accessory. Length: 100 cm (including the buckle) Crafted from pure leather with a fixed loop near the buckle Tang clasp with five holes to customise the Fit Brand name embossed on the tail for style Belt care Blot stains using a soft clean cloth and a branded leather softening agent If the belt gets wet, lay it flat and let it dry at room temperature Do not wear the belt everyday as the leather will stretch and mould to the shape of your hips Hang the belt from its buckle or curl it starting from the buckle and store away from direct sunlight do not fold the belt as the leather can crack
